title: Auto-close record page when you click outside of it

posts.author: Casey_M (Casey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Background/current behavior: When you click the expand icon (or the two arrows) to “Open [item name] page”, it expands the details pane to the right side. This screen displays the Updates | Files | Activity Log | Info Boxes tabs. Currently, you have to manually click the ‘x’ at the the top left to close this.

Request:
I would love if the details page just auto-closed when you click outside of it. For example, if I am viewing the details for one record, but I then want to click to another record, I have to actually click the 'x" to close out the details pane from the first record, even though I’m directly clicking on the 2nd one.

With tools like Airtable, when you open the details pane for a record, it autocloses the minute you click outside of the details pane window itself, making for easier transitioning between views and records.

Here’s a screen recording to explain the roadblock and my desired flow: Enhancing User Experience w...

What are you trying to achieve

Easier transitioning between records, less clunkiness in navigating between the record view and detail panes.
